tg.exp_basis: amorphous PLA Tg 331 K (58 C); honest +/-5% band. NOT the exp_lookup single-point [326,327.1].
tg.tg_note: single-rate slowest; rates [40,80,100]->[446.9,423.0,363.4] INVERTED -> slope-gate FAIL (prior summary mis-reported r100=363.4 as headline). Raw MD Tg ~446.9 K vs exp 331 K = FAIL (+28.6%); consistent with the well-known glassy MD cooling-rate overestimate (~+100 K) -- offset-corrected Tg lands at exp. Headline property for PLA is DENSITY (PASS), not Tg.

density.exp_basis: amorphous PLA 1.248 g/cm3 +/-5% (crystalline PLLA ~1.290 excluded). polymer_rules PEST density is null; 1.248 is the amorphous literature value.
density.density_note: HEADLINE PASS x4 (PLA glassy: density is the clean validated property). PCFF ~2% low, well inside band.

bulk_modulus.method_note: glassy hierarchy: Murnaghan WIDE window [-1000,0,1500,3000,5000], B0'=7.92, r2=0.9998 -> VALID primary. 5.14 GPa FAIL +14% over upper 4.5 (the single most rigorous PLA K, runs high). Fluctuation cross-check 4.70. Glassy BM hierarchy is Murnaghan-wide -> deform -> fluctuation (NOT uniform fluctuation, which is the rubbery convention). Method+run spread 3.1-5.1 GPa IS the finding: deform clusters in-band, wide-window Murnaghan (PLA4) runs high.

provenance.review_note: PLA replicate cross-check 2026-06-28: removed +100 K md_offset gamed-PASS (PLA1/PLA4); honest single-rate Tg FAIL (all slope-gate inverted); density headline PASS; glassy BM hierarchy per run.
